divine_soulshard.title: Collect a Divine Soulshard (Iron's Spellbooks — drops from Priests and Dead King in Catacombs)

dead_sea_scroll.title: Collect an Aquamirae Dead Sea Scroll (drops from Captain Cornelia or Mother of the Maze — Ch08)

subtitle.text: The Biological Eye needs what each civilization's worst left behind.

description: - irons_spellbooks:divine_soulshard (Priests/Dead King drop in ISS Catacombs)
- traveloptics:verdant_spellweave_ingot (T.O Magic 'n Extras — verdant boss drop)
- aquamirae:dead_sea_scroll (Aquamirae boss drop — Captain Cornelia/Mother of Maze)
Divine Soulshard: The Iron's Spellbooks Catacombs dungeon holds the Dead King boss.
Priests in the approach area also drop it.
The Dead King drops Blood Staff + legendary spells + divine_soulshard.
Dead Sea Scroll: return to the Aquamirae frozen ocean content (Ch08).
Captain Cornelia and the Mother of the Maze carry this drop.
→ Collect a Divine Soulshard (ISS Dead King/Priests) [check]
→ Collect an Aquamirae Dead Sea Scroll [check]
